mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO student_service_case(order_id, student_user_id, org_id, team_id, assigned_member_id, case_status) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{studentUserId}, #{orgId}, #{teamId}, #{assignedMemberId}, 'IN_SERVICE')
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM student_service_case WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
